Name: Construtora Fonseca & Mercadante (CFM)
Description:
Com 31 anos de história, a Construtora Fonseca & Mercadante é uma referência nacional em engenharia e construção civil no setor privado, reconhecida pela entrega de obras com alto desempenho técnico, excelência em gestão e compromisso com resultados.

Desde sua fundação em 1994, a empresa já construiu mais de 3 milhões de metros quadrados, atuando nos mais diversos segmentos: Shopping Centers, Data Centers, Indústria, Logística, Saúde, Edifícios Corporativos e Comerciais. A solidez de sua trajetória é sustentada por uma cultura organizacional ética, humana e transparente — valores que orientam as relações com clientes, parceiros e colaboradores.

Mais do que construir grandes empreendimentos, a CFM se dedica a construir relações de confiança, oferecendo soluções personalizadas, com alto nível de governança, inovação e respeito aos prazos e orçamentos. A atuação da empresa é pautada por rigor técnico, qualidade na execução, segurança nas operações e foco constante no resultado final para o cliente, da Pré-Construção à execução de obras.



Focada em clientes das áreas corporativa, indústria/logística, comércio/saúde e shopping centers, a empresa possui extensa experiência na gestão e execução de obras com projetos arquitetônicos ousados e demandas específicas. 

Sua experiência se traduz em eficiência nas várias etapas da construção, da elaboração de projetos e gerenciamento de custos à execução, aprovação e entrega da obra. 

A Fonseca & Mercadante, reafirma sua posição no mercado e aponta, nos próximos anos, para um crescimento estratégico que continua priorizando justamente o seu maior diferencial: a dedicação e a atenção personalizada a cada obra e a cada cliente.

Description:

Our Product Lineup:
•	SwiftWall Pro: Heavy-duty barriers for tough construction and industrial applications.
•	SwiftWall Max: Non-combustible and secure, meeting high safety standards.
•	SwiftWall Flex: Flexible and reconfigurable for evolving workspaces and healthcare.
•	SwiftWall Lite: Lightweight, cost-effective, and quick to install in commercial spaces.
•	SwiftWall Click: Tool-free assembly for rapid setup and easy reconfiguration.

Our patented modular systems simplify and accelerate installation, delivering professional-grade results without the need for skilled labor. Designed to meet the highest standards of safety and performance, SwiftWall products are reusable, reconfigurable, and durable, ideal for construction sites, dynamic workspaces, healthcare facilities, and more. They meet ASTM E-84 Class A/C and ICRA Class IV/V standards, with noise reduction capabilities of up to 50%, making them perfect for creating quiet environments in busy areas.

Key Benefits:
•	Fast & Simple Installation: Panels click together seamlessly in minutes.
•	No Skilled Labor Needed: Anyone can assemble, disassemble, or reconfigure.
•	Reusable & Reconfigurable: Adaptable to changing project needs, saving time and resources.
•	Professional Quality: Engineered for strength, stability, and reliability.
•	Lightweight & Durable: Built for robust performance in various applications.

At SwiftWall, we believe there’s a better way to install walls—one that’s sustainable, efficient, and adaptable. From multi-phase projects to large event spaces and industrial applications, SwiftWall makes transforming your space easy and impactful.

The 1st unit of fully automated and state of art manufacturing unit has been established at Ghatail, Tangail district which is only 120 kilometers from capital city of Bangladesh Dhaka. The manufacturing facility is equipped with producing various measurements AAC blocks with international standard compressive strength to cater specific architectural and design requirement of various types of building. Nextblock is a premium quality construction material and this is alternative solution to all traditional building material such as concrete block, hollow block, ceramic brick and clay bricks.
The state of art factory has the storage capacity of more than 5,000 m3, and the 

AAC block product supply will be sufficient to meet the demand of the on-goings projects. Name: Leonard Valve Company
Description:
In 1911, while getting a hot-towel shave at the local barber shop, Frederick C. Leonard had his face scalded by the non-tempered water used on his towel. An Inventor, Leonard knew that there had to be a way to deliver safe, tempered hot water from a plumbed source. His painful experience inspired him to design the World’s First Thermostatic Mixing Valve.

In the 110+ years since our Founder introduced the world to mechanically tempered hot water, we at Leonard Valve have built upon his legacy. Throughout our history, we have introduced innovative solutions that improve the safety and performance of domestic hot water systems. From thermostatic shower valves to digital mixing valves, our products are designed to keep up with modern-day needs, while providing “The Right Mix of Safety and Performance” every single time.

From the interior metal components of our valves to assembly and testing, our products are proudly Made in the U.S.A.! Our valves are assembled and tested by hand, by our team of skilled Union Craftsmen with decades of experience. The attention to detail we offer cannot be matched by machines and is one reason why we are the industry leader in quality, reliability, and durability.

Here at Leonard Valve, we take pride in our mission of continuing to provide industry leading water management solutions in our next century while maintaining our heritage of high quality, reliable, and dependable water temperature solutions.

This enterprise services 65% of the resorts in the Maldives, illustrating the group's substantial impact on the tourism sector, which is a crucial economic pillar of the nation.

Moreover, the Coastline Group of Companies encompasses a range of subsidiaries, each specializing in different areas. These include Coastline Investments, responsible for Asian Gas & Oil and Coastal Blocks, Coastline Hotels & Resorts, Kanufushi Investments, Coastline Pilling & Constructions, Platinum Real Estates Development, Al Shaali Marine Maldives, Boat & Engineering, The Small Maldives Island Co., and DIMO Coastline. Each of these entities contributes uniquely to the Maldivian economy, underlining the group's commitment to diversity and innovation in business.

The group's extensive involvement in mega projects over the past decade, especially in sectors like tourism, real estate, aviation, and transportation, has not only boosted the country's economy but also enriched the lifestyles of its people. This aligns with the group's mission to not just grow as a business entity but to actively contribute to the socio-economic development of the Maldives.

Jako doświadczony zespół inspektorów nadzoru inwestycyjnego, jesteśmy dumni z naszej zdolności do zapewnienia kompleksowej obsługi projektów budowlanych. Naszym celem jest zapewnienie wysokiej jakości nadzoru, który chroni interesy klientów, minimalizuje ryzyko i zapewnia zgodność z przepisami oraz standardami branżowymi.

Nasza oferta obejmuje pełen zakres usług inspektorskich, które obejmują nadzór budowlany, ocenę jakości, kontrolę postępów prac, audyty bezpieczeństwa, ocenę ryzyka oraz zarządzanie jakością. Współpracujemy zarówno z klientami indywidualnymi, jak i korporacjami, dostosowując nasze usługi do ich unikalnych potrzeb i oczekiwań.

Jesteśmy zespołem doświadczonych profesjonalistów, którzy posiadają szerokie spektrum wiedzy i umiejętności w dziedzinie inspekcji nadzoru inwestycyjnego. Dzięki naszemu bogatemu doświadczeniu w różnorodnych projektach budowlanych, jesteśmy w stanie skutecznie radzić sobie z wyzwaniami, które mogą się pojawić na drodze realizacji projektu.

Nasza firma wykorzystuje nowoczesne technologie i narzędzia, aby zapewnić naszym klientom najwyższą jakość usług. Pracujemy zgodnie z najnowszymi standardami branżowymi i przepisami, dbając o to, aby nasze działania były zgodne z najlepszymi praktykami.

Jesteśmy dumni z naszego doskonałego track recordu i długotrwałych relacji z naszymi klientami. Nasze podejście skoncentrowane na klientach oraz zaangażowanie w zapewnienie im satysfakcji i sukcesu są kluczowymi wartościami, które kierują naszą firmą.

Jeżeli szukasz profesjonalnej i kompleksowej obsługi inspektora nadzoru inwestycyjnego, zapraszam do skontaktowania się z nami. Razem możemy zrealizować Wasze projekty budowlane z powodzeniem, zapewniając wysoką jakość, terminowość i zgodność z wymaganiami.

Our philosophy is simple: 
Build with the right intention and deliver with absolute integrity.  

Every project starts with listening: understanding a client’s goals, timelines, and environment - so decisions stay efficient, budgets stay clear, and outcomes last.  That approach has made CourtPro+ a trusted partner for clubs, schools, universities, developers, and private clients across the U.S.

- Full-service racquet-sport construction (Padel, Squash, Pickleball, Tennis) 
- Engineering, architecture, and permitting support

To make racquet sports accessible, sustainable, and beautifully built, so every new court becomes a place where people play, connect, and belong.

Name: SILVER CONSTRUCT
Description:
Nous construisons des ouvrages électriques conformes à la norme NFC 13-100, rapidement (en moins de 45 jours), en solution modulaire et hybride, répondant par un produit unique aux installations de transformateurs à huile ou secs.  90 % recyclable et fabriqué en France.

Volta Station est avant tout une marque déposée mais aussi un projet breveté ambitieux qui peut révolutionner beaucoup de choses et optimiser le temps mais qui reste une offre complémentaire à celle des préfabriqués. 

Dans le domaine du génie civil, un produit novateur émerge : une enveloppe maçonnée en béton banché de 12 m² et 16 m²  plus (sur devis et spécifique), utilisant un coffrage perdu pour le coulage du béton hydrofuge. Cette approche réduit les délais de mise en œuvre et la manipulation des coffrages, conservés pour former la structure.

Ce produit garantit un délai de mise en œuvre de seulement 45 jours ouvrés ( processus béton léger Cemex en cours) jusqu'à la livraison de l'ouvrage sans équipements (Partenariat avec le leadermondial de l énergie)pour la fourniture de matériel. Il est conforme à la norme NFC 13-100 pour l'enveloppe en béton banché et répond aux normes et exigences de nos clients.

La résistance de cette construction d'une épaisseur de 22 cm dépasse largement celle des méthodes traditionnelles tandis que sa structure étanche, grâce au béton hydrofuge la rend résistante à l'humidité et aux diverses conditions climatiques.

Ce produit est également modulable et extensible avec une configuration adaptable selon les besoins du client. Il est 100 % étanche grâce à mon partenariat avec Roxtec Group.
Comparativement aux méthodes traditionnelles, telles que les murs en parpaing, cette solution offre une meilleure résistance et étanchéité. Les murs en béton banché sont coulés en une seule pièce évitant ainsi les joints où l'eau pourrait s'infiltrer.

Ми пропонуємо оренду та комплексний аутсорсинг логістичних послуг — від базового складування до повного управління ланцюгами постачання.

Наші потужності включають понад 205 000 м² складських площ у 4 сучасних комплексах зі стратегічним розташуванням біля Львова, що забезпечує швидкий доступ до кордону та основних транспортних артерій. ProTec Development пропонує три основні моделі співпраці — 3PL (логістика і складування), 3PD (логістика з маркетингом і дистрибуцією) та 3PD+ (повна інтеграція логістики, продажів і фінансів). Наші клієнти отримують персоналізований сервіс, сучасні технології (WMS, онлайн-управління проєктами), цілодобову технічну підтримку та інноваційні енергетичні рішення.

Ми прагнемо бути не просто орендодавцями, а надійними партнерами, які допомагають бізнесам розвиватися, оптимізуючи логістику, скорочуючи витрати і підвищуючи ефективність.

Gridline can undertake risk analyses based on completed DSA or ISA seismic reports to offer expert recommendations for what your next steps should be whether it be strengthening, demolition, or other any options.

Gridline NZ can advise on a client’s responsibilities in dealing with earthquake related health & safety risks under the HSWA.

Manage the entire process on behalf of the client, including nominating, appointing, and managing the structural engineers during the collation of any required information and the production of seismic reports.

Name: D&G Sheetmetal LLC
Description:
D&G Sheetmetal has been around for over 30 years with successful owners passing the torch to the younger generation.  The two current owners Michael McCusker and Richard Hagopian have over 50 years of combined experience. With both assuming management in 2020, followed by ownership, D&G Sheetmetal has continued to adapt to the changing culture of NYC construction.

 As a local 28 Union shop, we pride ourselves in providing the best quality of work and service for our customers, resulting in several customer relationships exceeding 20 years.  We assume the challenge of implementing duct design in order to maintain function as per the engineer's specifications, while avoiding change in the architect's vision.  This is no easy task, but our role is critical in this initial step, sometimes requiring a compromise from both.

Our experience in all aspects of the business allows us to understand the challenges on the job site and anticipate what is best for our customers, without placing an extra burden on our team.
Pricing Union work is very competitive while operating on small margins.  As a result, it makes our quality and service our top priority.  As we evolve with the times and technology, we feel very confident being one of the best choices for office space renovation in Local 28 for many years to come.

Name: Complete Industrial Coverage
Description:
As Industrial Construction Professionals, we are your reliable partner for complex project. Our expertise and experience can be seen in every project we take on. Our team is dedicated to delivering results that satisfy and exceed our clients expectations. We have skilled crew members nationwide, ready to meet all your industrial needs.

Our mission is simple: Ensure your equipment and operations run seamlessly with minimal to zero downtime due to equipment failures. We understand that output performance is maintained by successful equipment operations, so our goals is to provide the highest quality service in the market by focusing on the part installation details, OEM standards, equipment specifications and industry QA/QC procedures. We combine this with highly trained, seasoned professionals, which allows us to deliver the very best services in the industry. 

Data equals knowledge and insight into the operations of equipment. It is a valuable resource to properly build SOW's, plan routine maintenance and predict part life cycles. Our QA/QC's capture this important data on every piece of equipment we service and record it into our equipment inspection reports. Next, we historically track this information to identify life cycles of parts to assist in scope of work development and plan replacement / repairs during routine maintenance outages.  

When you choose us, you gain a partner dedicated to meeting  and exceeding your expectations in every way!

Name: KARAKAN
Description:
KARAKAN MÜHENDİSLİK  2007 yılından beri sektörde önde gelen mekanik tesisat firmalarında proje mühendisliği ve proje müdürlüğü görevleri üstlenen Ali KARAKAN  tarafından 2014 yılında kurulmuştur. Sektörde kendisine hızlı bir yer edinerek, 2015 yılı başından beri yoluna limited şirket olarak devam etmektedir.

KARAKAN MÜHENDİSLİK bina yapılarında mekanik tesisat sistemleri(HVAC) projelendirme, taahhüt ve danışmanlık amacıyla kurulmuştur. Otel, hastane, iş merkezi, alışveriş merkezi, fabrika,konut gibi çok çeşitli ve farklı alanlarda proje çalışmaları sürdürmektedir.

Yeniliğin ve değişimin, proje hizmetlerindeki mutlak önemini kavramış olan firma, sektördeki teknik gelişmeleri ve yenilikleri, gününde izlemek konusundaki duyarlılığını sürekli canlı tutmuş, bu amaçla da HVAC alanındaki saygın ve know-how üreten kuruluşlara üye olarak yeni ve teknik bilgi kaynaklarına doğrudan ulaşma olanağı bulmuştur. Yaptığı ve yapacağı uygulama projelerinde, teknolojinin yanı sıra, mimari ana temaya uygunluk, düşük işletme ve ön yatırım maliyeti, yüksek verimlilik, çevre ve doğa şartlarına uygunluk gibi dizayn kavramının ana kriterlerini temel prensipleri olarak belirlemiştir.

KARAKAN MÜHENDİSLİK firması olarak,beraber çalışmış olduğumuz proje ve dizayn grupları ile bina konseptine uygun çözümler üreterek ,sahada ortaya çıkabilecek uyumsuzlukları önceden görerek kısa sürelerde çok sayıda proje hedeflemeyi değil, doğru sistem seçimlerini,zamanında proje tesliminin sağlanması ve saha uygulama projeleri hedeflemektedir.

Name: CÔNG TY CỔ PHẦN ĐẦU TƯ XÂY DỰNG VÀ THƯƠNG MẠI HOÀ NAM
Description:
Hòa Nam là đơn vị chuyên tư vấn thiết kế, thi công hoàn thiện công trình xây dựng.
Chúng tôi không ngừng nỗ lực phát triển để trở thành doanh nghiệp uy tín, chất lượng và nhận được sự tin tưởng của nhiều khách hàng quan tâm sử dụng sản phẩm, dịch vụ.
Các công việc chúng tôi đảm nhận gồm:
 + Tư vấn, thiết kế, thi công hoàn thiện Cửa Nhôm, Mái Kính, Vách kính mặt dựng, Lan Can Kính, Cầu Thang Kính, Cabin phòng tắm, Cửa mở tự động, trần thạch cao, vách thạch cao, mái aluminium....
Với đội ngũ nhân viên, kỹ sư xây dựng, kiến trúc sư, tư vấn chuyên nghiệp năng động, nhiệt tình cùng đội ngũ công nhân, kỹ thuật lành nghề, có nhiều kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực thi công xây dựng chúng tôi đã và đang hoàn thiện đa dạng các loại hình như biệt thự, nhà dân, nhà xưởng, chung cư cao tầng, văn phòng,…
Chúng tôi luôn lắng nghe, thấu hiểu để hiện thực hóa mong muốn của khách hàng. Hiểu rõ được vị trí và giá trị công việc của mình là làm sao để khách hàng cảm thấy hài lòng về sản phẩm, dịch vụ nên chúng tôi luôn chú trọng, cẩn thận từng chi tiết nhỏ để công trình bền đẹp theo năm tháng.
Hòa Nam luôn đặt “Chữ Tín” là quan trọng hàng đầu mang lại sự yên tâm, hài lòng cho khách hàng. Chúng tôi mang đến cho bạn những ý tưởng thiết kế độc đáo, thi công “Chất Lượng – An Toàn – Thẩm Mỹ” thỏa mãn mọi yêu cầu của bạn về sản phẩm, dịch vụ.
Chúng tôi, đội ngũ trẻ không ngại học hỏi, áp dụng những kỹ thuật tiên tiến trong thiết kế, thi công để mang hiệu quả tốt nhất, tối ưu chi phí cho khách hàng. Đến với Hòa Nam, quý khách sẽ nhận được sự phục vụ chu đáo, chúng tôi sẽ tạo dựng không gian sống thoải mái, hoàn thiện tổ ấm của bạn.
Chúng tôi rất hân hạnh được tham gia vào quá trình xây dựng của quý khách!

Description:
A CORP ENGENHARIA é uma empresa prestadora de serviços de engenharia especializada em manutenção predial, assessoria AVCB, reformas de lojas (Retrofit), obras e manutenções de serviços de combate a incêndio, projetos e licenças de funcionamento. Nossos serviços de manutenção predial são realizados de forma preventiva e corretiva, garantindo o perfeito funcionamento de instalações elétricas, hidráulicas, combate a incêndio, entre outros. Além disso, oferecemos assessoria para obtenção de AVCB (Auto de Vistoria do Corpo de Bombeiros) e licenças de funcionamento, garantindo a regularidade e segurança dos estabelecimentos.

Na área de reformas de lojas (Retrofit), oferecemos soluções que unem estética e funcionalidade, garantindo ambientes modernos e atrativos para o público. Já em obras e manutenções de serviços de combate a incêndio, realizamos instalações e manutenções de sistemas de prevenção e combate a incêndios, como extintores, sprinklers, hidrantes, entre outros.

Nossa equipe de engenheiros e técnicos também é especializada em projetos de engenharia, desenvolvendo soluções sob medida para cada cliente e necessidade. Trabalhamos com os mais modernos softwares de engenharia, garantindo eficiência e precisão em cada projeto.

Enfim, a nossa empresa está preparada para atender as mais diversas demandas do mercado de engenharia, sempre com excelência, qualidade e segurança em todos os serviços prestados.

Name: Kiwi Conception
Description:
Kiwi Conception est un bureau d’études techniques indépendant, basé à Marseille, spécialisé en maîtrise d’œuvre (MOE), assistance à maîtrise d’ouvrage (AMO), design et intégration photovoltaïque.

 AMO / MOE / Design
Nous accompagnons les maîtres d’ouvrage publics et privés dans toutes les étapes de leurs projets :

En AMO, nous pilotons la phase amont : définition du programme, études préalables, autorisations administratives, budget et planification.

En MOE, nous assurons la conception technique, le suivi de chantier, la coordination des entreprises et la conformité des travaux.

En design, nous intégrons l’ergonomie, l’esthétique et la performance environnementale dans chaque espace conçu, en phase avec les usages et les normes.

 Bureau d’Études Techniques Photovoltaïque
Nous réalisons des études complètes pour l’intégration de solutions solaires sur bâtiment ou en site isolé :

Études de faisabilité, dimensionnement électrique, calepinage, simulation de productible, implantation et note de calcul structure.

Conformité réglementaire : demandes d’urbanisme, raccordement ENEDIS, suivi Consuel.

Accompagnement des porteurs de projet tiers investisseurs, promoteurs ou exploitants solaires, dans l’optimisation technique et économique des installations.

Notre approche repose sur une ingénierie rigoureuse, une maîtrise réglementaire et un sens du service tourné vers l'efficacité énergétique.
 Kiwi Conception intervient sur toute la France auprès des collectivités, industriels, bailleurs sociaux, promoteurs et acteurs de la transition énergétique.

Mediniai namai bei pirtys yra puiki alternatyva natūraliam, sveikam ir ekologiškam gyvenimui. Siūlome Jums patirtį ir technologijas sukauptas daugiau nei per 60 metų darbo. 

Honka rąstiniai namai ir pirtys yra statomi iš Suomijoje augančių medžių, nes mūsų įmonės šaknys yra giliai Suomijos miškuose, o ilgametė patirtis garantuoja jūsų šeimai ekologiškus namus, pastatytus iš grynos, atsinaujinančios ir aukštos kokybės medienos.

Mūsų tikslas – sukurti gražius ir funkcionalius, ilgaamžio skandinaviško dizaino namus. Namai, kuriuos lengva įsimylėti. Pasirinkite tradicinį arba šiuolaikinį stilių ir pritaikykite jį pasirinktomis detalėmis. Rąstinis namas Honka visada gaminamas taip, kad atitiktų jūsų poreikius ir gyvenimo būdą.

Mes jums galime padėti:
 Suprojektuoti jūsų rąstinio namo ar pirties viziją. Mūsų dizaino tarnybos ekspertai padės jums pritaikyti modelį, kad jis tiksliai atitiktų jūsų poreikius.
 Užtikrinti sklandų rąstų pristatymą iš Suomijos. Dėl mūsų veiksmingo gamybos proceso jūsų rąstinis namas bus paruoštas pristatyti vidutiniškai per 6–15 savaičių nuo užsakymo pateikimo. 
 Surinkti rąstinį namą ir pirtį. Vienas iš rąstinio namo privalumų yra tas, kad jį galima statyti bet kuriuo metų laiku, net ir viduržiemį.

Name: Sovereign Commercial Installations Limited
Description:
Two things stand out when you work with Sovereign Commercial Installations – enthusiasm and exceptional service. Our managing director, Stuart McAulay, sums it up perfectly:

“We are an enthusiastic, professional company and we’re proud of our reputation. By doing our best for our clients, they in turn can deliver the best experience for their staff and customers. However, we won’t rest on our laurels - if we can exceed our customers’ expectations, so much the better.”

Whether you have a small project or need a complete refurbishment package, the Sovereign Commercial Installations team can manage and control contracts ranging from just £1000 to over £1 million.

Our company ethos demands that we always offer exceptional value for money and, from conception through design ideas, CAD drawings and cost management, the team relish a challenge and gain huge satisfaction from knowing that a job has been well done, no matter how big or small, and has been carried out to the agreed budget and timescale.

Attention to detail is vital. Every part of each project is controlled. We’ll act on your behalf in legislative matters including Building Control, Planning Approvals and Fire Officer Approvals.

We are proud of our Investors in People accreditation, which recognises Sovereign Commercial’s high standard of training and ongoing support for its staff. Our highly skilled installation, management and support team ensures that our clients receive a unique and enthusiastic standard of service, for which nothing is too much trouble; we’ll do whatever is necessary to deliver to the tightest deadlines, with no surprises when it comes to the final account.

For commercial installations and building projects, you really can’t do better than work with the best: the Sovereign Commercial Installations team.

What We Do

Every project is unique, whether it’s a new build, rehabilitation, a retrofit, renovation, or historical building restoration.

We begin every commercial construction project with pre-project analytics to identify problem areas and recommend solutions well before construction begins. With a smart plan in place, we work collaboratively with owners, managers, architects, and our construction partners to move efficiently through all project phases.

Our Founder

Founder and CEO Matthew J. Moore launched the company in 2004 with decades of experience in construction, project management, and a commitment to superior craftsmanship. Matthew was inspired to create a company culture focused on smart planning, worksite efficiency, and quality results.  Nos produits et services comprennent :

 Structures légères : Nos structures novatrices, notamment les bulles, dômes géodésiques et dômes en polycarbonate, allient esthétisme et durabilité. Elles sont conçues pour se fondre dans leur environnement tout en offrant un confort exceptionnel.

 Installation : Nous assurons une installation de qualité, respectant les normes de sécurité et d’écologie. Notre équipe d'experts vous accompagne tout au long du processus.

 Plans 3D : Visualisez votre projet avant sa réalisation grâce à nos plans 3D détaillés. Nous travaillons avec vous pour créer un design personnalisé qui répond à vos besoins et attentes.

 Dossiers de subventions : Nous vous aidons à identifier et à solliciter des subventions potentielles pour financer votre projet.

 Sur mesure : Chez DomeBulle, nous comprenons que chaque projet est unique. C’est pourquoi nous offrons des solutions sur mesure, adaptées à vos spécificités et exigences.

 Logistique internationale : Où que vous soyez dans le monde, nous avons la capacité de livrer et d’installer nos structures. Notre réseau logistique international assure un service efficace et fiable.

Chez DomeBulle, nous croyons en la création d'espaces qui inspirent, reconnectent et revitalisent. Contactez-nous dès aujourd'hui pour donner vie à votre projet d'écolodge ou de gîte insolite!

 Solutions pour professionnels et particuliers : Que vous soyez un professionnel à la recherche de bâtiments à ossature métallique pour votre entreprise, un particulier désireux de réaliser un projet résidentiel unique ou une organisation engagée dans la réduction de son empreinte environnementale, CMB est là pour vous accompagner à chaque étape du processus. Name: Roof MRI
Description:
It’s time moisture scanning actually makes sense. 

Simple, fast, and seamlessly integrated into your bidding process. We’re proud to offer the first moisture scan ever designed specifically for commercial roofing, giving contractors a clear edge before bids even go out.

With our technology, you gain the power to pinpoint whether insulation must be torn off, spot replaced, dried out, or left alone. This restores R-value and preserves your client’s investment. No more guesswork, no more padding quotes, and no more slashing prices just to stay competitive. By bringing a reliable moisture scan into the early stages of planning, you can install better systems and do right by the environment, the client, and your bottom line.

Key Benefits:

• Faster, Smarter Bidding: Identify real needs up front so you can deliver accurate proposals.

• Better Installations: Make informed decisions on materials, eliminating costly surprises.

• Competitive Advantage: Stand out from the pack by showing you’re committed to true solutions, not just the cheapest price.

Stop leaving moisture detection to chance. Discover how data-driven insights can help you win more bids, boost profitability, and deliver peace of mind. This is what commercial roofing has been missing.

Name: SFCM • Services For Construction Management
Atamate Building Intelligence
Description:
Our vision is to make buildings better! Atamate reduces energy consumption, reduces maintenance and reduces building management, while keeping occupants in a healthy, safe, secure and comfortable environment. On top of that we make buildings easier to build and use, as well as cheaper to build (or retrofit) and run. 

To do this we have built atBOS, a wireless monitoring and control system, from the ground up. Our sensors and meters measure and monitor your building. Software analyses the data generated, and uses actuators and gateways to control the devices in a building, while also sharing data via the Atamate cloud.

Our team comprises specialists in energy, health, engineering, and technology, with significant experience in construction and property. All our software is written in-house and all of our products are manufactured in the UK.

Name: Aire+
Description:
VOTRE PROBLÉMATIQUE 

Vous êtes dirigeant d'entreprise, vous n'êtes ni économiste du bâtiment, ni conducteur de travaux ! Votre rôle de dirigeant est de développer l'activité de votre entreprise, et cela commence par faire des choix stratégiques qui soutiennent cette mission.

Construire ou rénover un bâtiment professionnel implique plusieurs défis :

 Naviguer dans les réglementations,
 Obtenir les autorisations, 
 Gérer les coûts,
 Résoudre les difficultés de financement, 
 Choisir des entrepreneurs fiables,
 Faire face aux délais. 
 Gérer les problèmes environnementaux, 
 Répondre aux défis de conception,
 Assurer la gestion de projet


LA SOLUTION AIRE+ 

Confier son projet à un contractant général du bâtiment offre une gestion centralisée et efficace. Cela vous garantit :

 Une coordination optimale des différents métier, 
 Un respect des délais et du budget, 
 Une qualité constante,
 De l’expertise et de l’expérience, 
 La réduction des risques,
 Moins de soucis !

NOS RÉSULTATS 

 Réduction des Coûts :
Les contractants généraux peuvent réduire les coûts globaux d’un projet de 10 à 20 % grâce à une meilleure gestion des ressources et à la négociation avec les sous-traitants.

 Respect des Délais :
L'efficacité de la gestion de projet peut améliorer le respect des délais de 30 à 40 %, évitant ainsi de coûteux retards.

 Qualité et Conformité :
Une supervision professionnelle assure une qualité de construction plus élevée et une meilleure conformité aux normes, réduisant les risques futures.

 Gestion des Risques :
La centralisation de la gestion des risques peut diminuer les incidents et les complications de 15 à 25 %.


NOTRE PARCOURS 

Depuis 17 ans, aire+ accompagne les dirigeants d'entreprises dans la conception et la réalisation des travaux de constructions ou de rénovations de leurs bâtiments. Fort de cette expertise, nous sommes aujourd'hui un acteur incontournable sur le sud-ouest.

Name: Grupo Odim
Description:
Desde su fundación, Grupo Odim S.A. se ha consolidado como una empresa referente en el diseño, fabricación y montaje de estructuras metálicas para la industria, el agro, el comercio y la logística. Nuestro crecimiento sostenido se basa en un fuerte compromiso con la calidad, el cumplimiento de plazos y la atención personalizada a cada cliente.

Contamos con una planta propia ubicada en Spegazzini, equipada con tecnología de punta y un equipo técnico altamente capacitado. Esto nos permite producir internamente todas las estructuras que luego montamos, garantizando un control total de calidad en cada etapa del proceso.

Diseñamos y construimos galpones industriales, naves logísticas, entrepisos, silos, celdas, torres, pasarelas y estructuras especiales adaptadas a los requerimientos de cada proyecto. Nuestra experiencia incluye tanto obras llave en mano como adecuaciones o ampliaciones para plantas ya operativas.

Trabajamos con empresas líderes de sectores como alimentación, retail, energía, logística y agroindustria, brindando soluciones integrales que optimizan costos, mejoran tiempos de ejecución y aseguran resultados de alta performance estructural.

En Grupo Odim, creemos que cada proyecto es una oportunidad para construir relaciones duraderas, basadas en la confianza, el profesionalismo y el compromiso con el desarrollo de nuestros clientes.

Name: LM Rengøring
Description:
I en verden, hvor hvert minut tæller, forstår vi hos LM Rengøring vigtigheden af øjeblikkelig respons og upåklagelig service. Når du ringer, er vi der for dig med løsninger og et lyttende øre. Vi træder ikke blot ind som din rengøringsservice - vi bliver en del af dit team, dedikeret til at rette op på selv de mindste fejl og sikre, at alt er præcist som du ønsker det.

Det, der virkelig adskiller os, er vores urokkelige passion for at finde den rette løsning, skræddersyet til dine unikke behov. Vi bringer ro i dit sind ved ikke bare at tage ansvar for vores arbejde, men ved at gå et skridt videre – vi tænker ud af boksen for at sikre de mest innovative og effektive rengøringsmetoder er i spil.

Typiske opgaver:
- Grov rengøring
- Slut rengøring
- Finish rengøring
- Vinduespolering
- Kontorrengøring
- Trappevask
- Skurvogne
- Byggepladsservice

Vores kunder værdsætter det behagelige samarbejde, den tydelige og konkrete kommunikation, og den måde vi overgår forventningerne på. Vi er fleksible og stabile – en kombination, der sikrer, at hvert eneste ønske imødekommes med professionalisme og et smil. Ærlighed ligger i vores grundværker - vi er ikke for alle, men for dem, vi er for, stræber vi efter at være de allerbedste.

Med LM Rengøring kan du stole på, at vi leverer – ikke kun renlighed, men også en positiv attitude og et drive, der overskygger alt andet. Vores mål er ikke at være endnu et rengøringsfirma. 

Vi ønsker at være din hustler i renhedens verden, der sikrer at ingen stikkontakt, ingen krog eller krinkelkrog bliver overset. Vi er alle sammen en del af denne vision – uanset sprog eller baggrund, du er garanteret den samme kvalitet og respekt.

Name: Excela Group
Description:
At Excela, we create value for clients throughout the Chicagoland area by combining our knowledge and experience of the local market with our established relationships to provide excellent client service. 
We offer fully integrated owner representation services to maximize ROI and asset value. With a deep understanding of the complexities of corporate, institutional, and entrepreneurial owners, we develop comprehensive, individualized marketing strategies to achieve the highest possible alignment with owner investment objectives, predicting market challenges before they become issues for owners.
Changes in the Economy 
Fluctuations in demand for commercial real estate and pricing always affect the commercial property owner. We partner with clients to strategically build properties to align with tenant behavior to help clients maintain competitive positions. 
Finding the Right Match
Finding the right tenants that match your property’s business model, culture, and location can be challenging. We assist by staying up to date on tenant demands such as technology or transportation needs, ensuring your properties meet tenant expectations. 
Changing Demographics

Your target customer is different today. So why are you still communicating with them in the same way you always have? We help owners connect with today’s customers by maintaining an understanding of current and emerging trends. 

Rise in Experiential Consumerism

Commercial property owners must adapt to changing trends to remain relevant. Consumers crave an environment where their purchasing needs become an experience, translated into retail showroom spaces and mixed-use environments. 

We serve as the owner’s representative, building bridges with owners, project managers, and contractors and filling in gaps left by design professionals, commissioning agents, and general contractors. We are committed to helping clients achieve excellence through cost estimation/reduction, project coordination, and deep knowledge.

Name: DSL Enginyeria i Arquitectura
Description:
DSL es una empresa de estudios técnicos de ingeniería y arquitectura fundada en 1995 por Daniel Puente y especializada en los sectores de industria, comercio y corporativo.

A lo largo de nuestra trayectoria, hemos realizado más de 2.000 proyectos de construcción e instalaciones.

Nuestra misión es aportar soluciones de calidad a nuestros clientes, y para ello trabajamos los proyectos desde una perspectiva integral. Nos responsabilizamos de todo el proceso, desde el diseño hasta la construcción y puesta en marcha de la instalación. Además, gracias a nuestra visión multi disciplinar, cada elemento del proyecto se integra con la máxima eficiencia al conjunto.

Nuestra filosofía se basa en combinar la creatividad de la arquitectura con el rigor de la ingeniería. Del mismo modo, incorporamos el desarrollo sostenible en la política energética basándonos en criterios de funcionalidad y economía, a partir de los cuales se trabaja la estética. Creemos que para que una construcción sea funcional, debe de ser diseñada desde la racionalidad. Y para que sea económicamente viable, es necesario un estudio en profundidad del mantenimiento general así como del consumo energético y la utilización de los materiales y tecnologías indicados en cada caso.

La línea de diseño que seguimos busca la máxima eficiencia energética, integrando soluciones arquitectónicas con las últimas tecnologías de instalaciones, lo que hace posible el balance energético cero.

El equipo de DSL está formado por un grupo de profesionales con una alta calificación técnica y amplia experiencia en el diseño y ejecución de proyectos. Más allá del dinamismo, nuestra principal característica es la diversidad de especialidades de cada uno de los miembros del equipo: estructuras, energía, telecomunicaciones, domótica, acústica, urbanización, construcción, etc.

Contáctanos: info@dsl.cat

Name: BH'İnşaat
Description:
BH İnşaat – 25 Yıllık Tecrübe, Yüzlerce Başarı Hikayesi

Başçınar Hatipoğlu İnşaat (BH İnşaat), 25 yıllık birikimiyle inşaat sektöründe güvenin, kalitenin ve sürdürülebilirliğin temsilcilerinden biridir. Bugüne kadar altyapıdan üstyapıya, kamu projelerinden özel sektör yatırımlarına, yüzlerce projeyi başarıyla tamamladık.

Okul, yurt, hastane, fabrika gibi kurumsal yapılar; bakım, tadilat, güçlendirme, yenileme ve komple yıkım-yeniden yapım projeleri gibi tüm kapsamlı işlerde uzmanlığımızla fark yaratıyoruz. Her ölçekteki işte; zamanında teslim, teknik yeterlilik ve çözüm odaklı yaklaşımımızla müşterilerimizin yanında yer alıyoruz.

KOBİ’lerden bireysel yatırımcılara, kamu kurumlarından büyük ölçekli özel şirketlere kadar geniş bir kitleye hizmet veriyor; uzman kadromuz ve yenilikçi çözümlerimizle her projeyi bir adım ileri taşıyoruz.

Misyonumuz
Misyonumuz, kaliteli inşaat hizmetleri sunarak müşteri memnuniyetini en üst seviyeye çıkarmak, projeleri zamanında ve bütçe dostu bir şekilde tamamlamak, çevreye duyarlı ve sürdürülebilir çözümler geliştirmektir. Her projede, müşteri ihtiyaçlarını ön planda tutarak güvenilir, yenilikçi ve etkili çözümler üretmek, topluma ve sektöre değer katmak hedefindeyiz.

Vizyonumuz
Vizyonumuz, inşaat sektöründe lider bir firma olarak tanınmak, ulusal ve uluslararası alanda projeler geliştirerek büyümek ve sürdürülebilir inşaat çözümleri ile geleceğe sağlam temeller atmak. Sektörümüzde kaliteyi, güveni ve müşteri odaklı çalışmayı ön planda tutarak, her projede sektöre örnek bir başarı ortaya koymaktır.

Name: AMH Hire
Description:
Founded in 2018, AMH Hire delivers containerised, tailored multi-use space solutions at speed.

With over 30 years’ experience in the construction industry, site accommodation and staff welfare, the team behind AMH Hire identified a gap in the market for stylish containerised space solutions that could be both put in place at speed and customised according to the client’s needs.  

With over 5000 containers used for hire every year, AMH Hire design containers to a ‘plug in and play’ specification which means that they can be installed quickly and used modularly, fitting together with ease. Offering the ultimate in flexibility, AMH Hire containers can be permanently installed, hired long-term or even purchased.

Tailored to your needs
Our eco-friendly containers can be delivered UK-wide and designed around your precise needs, whether you’re opening a shop or a mixology bar. AMH Hire containers allow you to fill your container with the equipment that you need and then we can interior design your container around your brand. Our dedicated team works closely with each client on an individual basis to design a solution tailored to your needs.

With sustainability at the heart of our operations, we use non-toxic materials in our modular buildings to ensure that we’re an environmentally-friendly company with a low carbon footprint. Our containers are endlessly recyclable, which helps to minimise use of landfill.

Quick, Reliable, Customisable
Our containers can be fitted and installed in days. We know the importance of business-as-usual operations and our quick lead times mean that we can fully fit and test containers off-site within one to two days, before installing them and handing them over to you. And the part that everyone forgets…. When you no longer need your container, we remove it at speed with minimum fuss.

Name: BIMForum Global
Description:
The mission of BIMForum Global is to make improvements within the built environment. This is achieved through results-oriented research that delivers practical implementation of technology to project owners and their team.  

BIMForum Global (The Forum, “BFG”) is a forum of Ascend Building Knowledge Foundation (ABKF) with the focused goal of improving the built environment through the practical implementation of innovation for project owners and their teams. The target audiences are the Virtual Design and Construction (VDC) professionals and the organizational leaders who serve, guide and direct them. While The Forum does draw from rigorous academic research through Ascend, it is focused on practical, realistic application of VDC processes on real world projects. The BIMForum Global content is developed from Ascend’s research in architecture, engineering, construction, and Operations/Facility Management (AECO-FM), as well as, practical feedback from end users and other organizations that Ascend collaborates with.  

The ABKF was established in 2017 to provide the AECO-FM industry evidence based research that leads to educational tools VDC professionals can utilize to improve their teams, organizations and projects through innovation and advancements in technology and processes. 

The Ascend Building Knowledge Foundation focuses on research and training for high performance projects in the AEC-FM industry, seeking to provide the resources that will allow the industry to continue to develop, adapt, and grow. At ABKF, we want to equip the current and future generations of AEC workers with the knowledge and capabilities to innovate in the area of building technology. Our focus is on researching trends and innovations within the industry and using that research to educate, equip and collaborate within the industry.

Ascend Building Knowledge Foundation is incorporated as a nonprofit, public benefit, charitable research & education foundation with 501(c)(3) status.

Hos Nordic Stone Care hjælper vi virksomheder, boligforeninger, ejendomsudviklere og kommuner i Danmark med at gøre deres bygninger mere holdbare, energieffektive og bæredygtige. 

Vi brænder for at levere innovative tagløsninger, der ikke bare holder længe, men også styrker jeres ESG-profil, ved at reducere miljøpåvirkningen og optimere driftsomkostninger.

Vores hvide silicone tagmembran er designet til flade tage og leverer konkrete fordele:

Sparer energi: Holder taget køligt (kun 5-10 grader over udetemperaturen mod tagpaps 40-60 grader), hvilket skærer op til 35% af køleomkostningerne og skaber et bedre indeklima.

Bæredygtighed i fokus: Markant reduceret CO2-aftryk gennem lang holdbarhed og lavere energiforbrug, hvilket understøtter jeres ESG-mål og bidrager til en grønnere fremtid.

Booster solceller: Forbedrer solcellers effektivitet med op til 15% med den reflekterende overflade.

Bygget til at holde: Over 40 års levetid, tæt mod lækager og modstandsdygtig over for stillestående vand. Op til 25 års garanti og brandklasse Broof(t2).

Vi skræddersyr løsninger til industri, produktion, kontorer og boligkomplekser, så I får en pålidelig, energieffektiv og bæredygtig tagløsning, der løfter både jeres ejendomme og jeres miljøprofil.

Lad os tage en snak om, hvordan vi kan styrke jeres ejendomme og ESG-indsats. Ring til os på 51 53 18 16 eller skriv til info@nordicstonecare.dk – vi er klar til at hjælpe!

Name: ALL IN & Associés
Description:
"All In": c'est enfin LA VRAIE réponse adaptée aux besoins du chef d'entreprise qui hésite entre Maîtrise d'œuvre et Clés en mains pour mener à bien son projet immobilier professionnel.
Que ce soit en bureaux, entrepôts, locaux d'activités... en bâtiment neuf, rénovation ou extension ALL IN s'occupe de TOUT depuis la naissance de votre besoin jusqu'après la livraison. 

Mais avant de comprendre la solution "ALL IN": un rappel sur les différences entre Maîtrise d'œuvre classique et Clés en mains. 

La Maîtrise d'œuvre classique est une garantie de moyens. Le prestataire vous présente les devis établis par des entreprises de travaux, vous signez les contrats et il pilote le chantier. Il prend un ratio d'honoraires sur les travaux que vous commandez. C'est une solution normalement moins coûteuse car c'est vous qui supportez le risque sur la fiabilité des entreprises de travaux. Vous pouvez plus facilement moduler votre projet en cours de réalisation. Vous devrez consacrer un certain temps en réunion de chantier hebdomadaire. La Maîtrise d'œuvre permet de démarrer plus vite le travail, lancer le permis de construire rapidement et lancer aussitôt les consultations.

Le clés en mains est une garantie de résultat. Le prestataire s'engage sur un prix ferme, une date de livraison et un descriptif. C'est plus onéreux mais plus sécurisant SI ET SEULEMENT SI TOUT est bouclé avant la signature. (exemple: si l'étude de sol n'est réalisée qu'après signature et qu'elle révèle une qualité différente des hypothèses stipulées au contrat, des travaux supplémentaires vous seront réclamés...) C'est une solution qui vous libère du temps (pas d'obligation d'être aux réunions de chantier hebdomadaires). Une fois le contrat signé vous pouvez modifier des prestations mais en en acceptant le coût... 

Alors comment bénéficier du meilleur des deux avec ALL IN ?

ALL IN finalise avec vous le programme, dépose le permis de construire, lance l'étude de sol et consulte les Entreprises. 
Pendant ce

Description:
Zbudujhale.pl to projekt, który powstał w odpowiedzi na aktualne realia polskiego rynku budowy obiektów przemysłowych – szczególnie hal. Przedsiębiorcom bardzo trudno zorientować się w mnogości technologii, przepisach prawa budowlanego i ofertach firm, które często przekonują do wyższości swoich rozwiązań. 

Mamy ponad 12 lat doświadczenia w branży, na koncie setki spotkań z przedsiębiorcami i jeszcze więcej omówionych koncepcji oraz projektów budowlanych. Wybudowaliśmy kilkadziesiąt obiektów z firmami wykonawczymi. A jednak wciąż napotykamy te same problemy zarówno na etapie projektowania, jak i budowy.

Jesteśmy przekonani, że proces budowlany może być łatwiejszy, lepiej zorganizowany i bardziej przyjazny. Upraszczamy go nie tyko dla klientów branży budownictwa przemysłowego, ale również dla firm budowlanych, wykonawców hal, którzy mogą skupić się na oferowaniu swoich usług zgodnie z wypracowanym i sprawdzonym modelem biznesowym. 

Takie podejście pozwala podpisywać realnie partnerskie umowy budowlane i skupiać się na tym, co rozwija biznes zarówno inwestorom jak i wykonawcom.

Duomax Developments is a locally owned and operated general construction contractor proudly serving the Niagara Peninsula and surrounding areas since 1975. Our expertise includes competitive bid projects, design-build services, construction management, and pre-engineered steel buildings. Whether working from fully developed plans or collaborating from the earliest design stages, our team brings practical knowledge, cost awareness, and attention to detail to every project.

At Duomax, we believe communication and collaboration are the foundation of a successful build. Our long-standing relationships with trusted employees, trades, and subcontractors allow us to maintain high standards of safety, efficiency, and craftsmanship on every job site. From warehouses and commercial facilities to specialized industrial spaces, we focus on delivering projects that are functional, durable, and built to last.

Our approach is flexible and service-driven. We adapt to each client’s vision, providing guidance on materials, methods, and budgeting to ensure projects are both achievable and cost-effective. With decades of industry experience behind us, we continue to combine proven construction practices with modern building solutions.

Duomax Developments — Constructed With Confidence

Name: Montacchiello
Description:
Certi distretti si creano grazie a un invisibile legge dell’attrazione. La sfida della Forti Holding per il prossimo futuro è fare in modo che l’attrazione continui, attraverso una costante ricerca di offerte infrastrutturali e di servizio. L’ambizioso obiettivo è di creare un ambiente in grado di offrire una qualità della vita professionale superiore.

Montacchiello presenta le caratteristiche ottimali per nuovi insediamenti tecnologici, direzionali, commerciali e manifatturieri, data la vicinanza a importanti infrastrutture di collegamento e le elevate dotazioni impiantistiche tra cui il cablaggio in fibra ottica.

A oggi Montacchiello ospita più di 50 aziende che danno lavoro a oltre 1.500 persone. A impreziosire l’area la presenza di aziende che operano nel settore ICT ad altissimo livello di specializzazione e rivolte a un mercato nazionale e internazionale.

All’interno dell’area, la Forti Holding ha sviluppato importanti progetti high tech quali i centri direzionali altamente tecnologici che ospitano grandi realtà aziendali del terziario avanzato. In particolare il Centro La Vela, dove sono ospitate importanti software house e il digital campus Talent Garden Pisa, e il primo green building a Pisa dedicato al fondatore dell’omonima impresa ossia il Centro Direzionale Umberto Forti, uno dei lavori più ambiziosi affrontati negli ultimi anni e vero simbolo di edilizia sostenibile di tutta la regione Toscana.

Name: Northeast Painting & Coatings
Description:
At Northeast Painting & Coatings, we are dedicated to delivering superior commercial painting services that not only enhance the visual appeal of businesses but also contribute to their success. Our commitment to precision, innovation, and client satisfaction drives us to excel in every project we undertake.

We understand that the appearance of a commercial space plays a critical role in shaping customer perceptions and employee morale. What truly sets us apart is our ability to create a customized paint system for each client's unique working environment. We pride ourselves on our easy-to-work-with approach, starting with a thorough assessment of your specific needs and challenges. By tailoring a coatings system to suit your distinct environment, we ensure that our finishes not only look great but also perform exceptionally well in your setting.

Our proactive approach means that we anticipate your needs, address potential challenges before they arise, and ensure that every project is completed on time and within budget. When it comes to applying the right coatings for various environments, we have the expertise to recommend and implement coatings that are not only aesthetically pleasing but also durable and perfectly aligned with your workspace requirements.

Additionally, we take our responsibility to protect your business assets seriously. Whether it's safeguarding sensitive equipment, ensuring proper surface preparation, or using premium, long-lasting coatings, we go the extra mile to protect your valuable assets.

That's why we take pride in being the trusted partner businesses turn to when they want to make a lasting impression while safeguarding their investments. Our purpose is not just about painting walls; it's about empowering businesses to thrive by creating the perfect backdrop for their success. We do this with unwavering passion, uncompromising integrity, and a relentless pursuit of excellence.

Name: Jameson Roofing
Description:
WE THINK LONG TERM
Our company has grown bigger and stronger over the decades by staying true to our principles: bringing our people home safe, delivering uncompromising quality, investing in the business, and taking care of our team and communities.

Our company history spans four generations of family ownership and operation. As a company committed to our people and our industry for the long term, we make decisions based on the next 100 years, not the next quarter. 

QUALITY
We do not compromise on quality. We have installed and mastered virtually every commercial roofing system including the built-up systems of old, all single-ply systems, all sheet metal systems, and most recently, a wide range of fluid-applied systems. 

COMMUNITY
We wouldn’t be where we are today without the support of the communities we serve. We are proud to sponsor local sports teams, donate to local causes, and volunteer for community events.

INNOVATION
We utilize technology and innovation to amplify our competencies in quality, safety, and customer experience. We have drone capabilities, paperless software for all service work, and the latest construction software to ensure we let the innovations of the future enhance our business.

Name: Sovereign Commercial Installations
Description:
Two things stand out when you work with Sovereign Commercial Installations – enthusiasm and exceptional service. Our managing director, Stuart McAulay, sums it up perfectly:

“We are an enthusiastic, professional company and we’re proud of our reputation. By doing our best for our clients, they in turn can deliver the best experience for their staff and customers. However, we won’t rest on our laurels - if we can exceed our customers’ expectations, so much the better.”

Whether you have a small project or need a complete refurbishment package, the Sovereign Commercial Installations team can manage and control contracts ranging from just £1000 to over £1 million.

Our company ethos demands that we always offer exceptional value for money and, from conception through design ideas, CAD drawings and cost management, the team relish a challenge and gain huge satisfaction from knowing that a job has been well done, no matter how big or small, and has been carried out to the agreed budget and timescale.

Attention to detail is vital. Every part of each project is controlled. We’ll act on your behalf in legislative matters including Building Control, Planning Approvals and Fire Officer Approvals.

We are proud of our Investors in People accreditation, which recognises Sovereign Commercial’s high standard of training and ongoing support for its staff. Our highly skilled installation, management and support team ensures that our clients receive a unique and enthusiastic standard of service, for which nothing is too much trouble; we’ll do whatever is necessary to deliver to the tightest deadlines, with no surprises when it comes to the final account.

For commercial installations and building projects, you really can’t do better than work with the best: the Sovereign Commercial Installations team.

Contact us:

Website - sovereigncommercial.com
Email - info@sovcomm.co.uk 
Phone - 01323 763179

Name: Coach, Truck & Tractor, LLC
Description:
Coach, Truck & Tractor is a family-owned, independent crane service provider. We are located in Williston, North Dakota, providing service in Dickinson, Watford City, Tioga, other Bakken oil field cities, and nationally. We provide service, inspection, and repair for all-terrain, crawler, truck, pickers, overhead, and tower cranes. We provide hydraulic component rebuilding and resealing, and our hydraulic cylinder table can accommodate cylinders in excess of 40′ to 120′. Our services are available on-site and at our facility 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

In order to provide efficient break-down service and maintenance, we are an authorized Parker Store Hose Doctor, offering mobile hydraulic hose replacement services. 

Additionally, we are an authorized Isuzu Industrial Engine dealer, providing sales, service, and parts. Our technicians are factory-trained and offer the latest diagnostic and service techniques. 

CT&T prides itself on its approach to safety with membership in, ISNetworld, North Dakota Safety Council, Crane Certification Association of America, and Energy Coalition for Contractor Safety. We have insurance coverage, both professional and general liability.

Next to safety, our biggest priority is quality of service by offering continuing education to our technicians, OEM products, and a culture of “do it right the first time.”

Name: APGAir
Description:
@APGAir Understands the Importance of Air Purification
While COVID-19 may no longer be top of mind for some organizations, recent surveys and continued research show that the need to improve IAQ is here to stay. The devastating global impact of the latest pandemic permanently altered public perceptions of indoor air quality and how organizations need to change. Employees are aware of the impact of air quality on their health.

The push for cleaner indoor air in our workplaces has been led by public health researchers, national associations and the White House, which have all recognized the role employers, contractors and consultants can play in designing and improving workplaces for better indoor air quality (IAQ). Fellowes surveyed over 1,000-employees of all ages and found that only 1-in-3 said the air was very clean. However 73% of people surveyed agreed that the quality of the air they breathe directly impacts their health and well-being.

Indoor Air Quality Management is Here to Stay
According to research conducted by Carbon Lighthouse, over 80% of millennials said they would feel safer returning to the office if they had access to real-time, transparent information on indoor air quality.

Somos especialistas en desarrollo de proyectos turísticos en la naturaleza. Estamos especializados en el turismo experiencial.

Fruto de esta especialización ha surgido el modelo Orbit, un modelo revolucionario que tiene varios aspectos que lo hacen único:

a) Cuidamos mucho el diseño y la parte sensorial a la hora de habitar el pabellón.
b) El sistema de giro buscando atardeceres, amaneceres o ver diferentes constelaciones, buscando privacidad o simplemente protección del viento, el calor o el frío.
c) Por otro lado, es el único domo o pabellón geodésico cuyo gran ventanal permite apertura y cierre estanco con sistema de corredera.
d) ANGULAR envía los triángulos del domo patetizado en un KIT listo para su instalación. Puede contratar a montadores locales o puede montarlo usted si dispone de algunos conocimientos de autoconstrucción. También puede contratarnos su montaje. Nuestros Domos se hacen únicamente con 2 tamaños de triángulos, y por tanto el montaje es más sencillo. Otros fabricantes pueden llegar a facilitar hasta 30 tipos distintos de triángulos lo que complica su montaje.
e) Usamos maderas certificadas de alta calidad y alta eficiencia energética. Aislantes naturales, en general huimos de productos químicos que no provengan directamente de la naturaleza.
f) Nuestros domos se pueden desmontar.
g) Los domos vienen ya tratados con aceites para barcos, de tal forma que su mantenimiento sea mínimo.

Monaghan is a full service commercial construction company headquartered in Saint Paul, Minnesota offering design/build, construction management, and general contracting services.
 
Ours is a pioneering story dating back to the mid-19th century. It’s a story about craftsmanship, integrity, and construction masters who began their journey in the provincial county of Monaghan, Ireland. For more than a century, McGough family members have crafted buildings with purpose and precision.
 
Monaghan Construction Company strives to operate by the principles our ancestors six generations ago defined. They operated in the days when buildings were built on a handshake and trust, embodying a spirit of building with purpose and integrity while delivering superior construction and inspired service. Today, we fully embrace this longstanding family tradition, advancing the pioneering methods of our predecessors with a modern approach to construction guided by the principles of our ancestors. This is the spirit that lives in everything we build.

Description:

Engineering, production and assembly
Static calculations, calculations and working drawings are made in-house and converted into detailed 3D models by our skilled structural engineers. The steel structures are then produced by certified production staff. Both transport and assembly can also be taken care of entirely by Wopereis Staalbouw. All these facets ensure a durable, reliable end result.

Quality and reliability

Name: Shedmate
Description:
Double your shed sales profitably without new hires or franchise strings

Over the last few years, we’ve helped shed businesses, from small resellers to 8-figure manufacturers, move from manual quoting and fragmented systems to full automation. Whether they work with cold-formed or structural steel, our clients scale faster, cut quoting delays, and regain control of their operations.

Shedmate is the first BIM Software explicitly designed for the Shed Industry, addressing critical challenges like quoting delays, scalability issues, and customisation limitations, aligning with aspirations for growth, efficiency, and independence.

By adopting Shedmate as a premium product, your business can operate more smoothly, grow more rapidly, and achieve higher profitability. This isn’t just another software tool; it’s a real-time system that works for you, helping to reduce the labour involved in designing, quoting, and completing shed projects.

If you’re a shed builder, reseller, or manufacturer sick of waiting on engineers, juggling multiple quoting tools, or being tied to a franchise's software, Shedmate is built for you.

Our cloud-based platform lets you design, quote, and engineer sheds in real-time, whether it’s cold-formed or structural steel. That means you can give your customers instant, accurate quotes with compliant plans, cut up to 95% of drafting time, and keep your margins under your own brand.

With Shedmate, you can:
• Double your shed sales without increasing headcount
• Go from enquiry to council-ready plans in minutes
• Sell your designs your way, and own your profits
• Break free from bottlenecks, errors, and supplier restrictions

Our Big Promise: Double your shed sales profitably without new hires or franchise strings

Shedmate is more than software, it’s your always-on quoting, drafting, and engineering team in a straightforward platform.

Ao longo de mais de uma década, entregamos mais de 2 mil obras nos setores de engenharia, arquitetura, construção e reforma. Assim, conquistamos a confiança de clientes como Ambev, USP, Creditas, Quantiq e outros.

Name: Witkowski Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Firma Witkowski jest przedsiębiorstwem rodzinnym założonym w 1981 roku przez obecnego Prezesa Zarządu Leszka Witkowskiego. Od ponad 20 lat jesteśmy związani z zabezpieczeniami przeciwpożarowymi obiektów użyteczności publicznej - jako producent i dostawca biernych przegród ppoż. 

Leszek Witkowski, jako wieloletni Przewodniczący Komisji Biernej "Ogólnopolskiego Stowarzyszenia Producentów Zabezpieczeń Przeciwpożarowych i Sprzętu Pożarowego", czynnie zabiega o nowelizację przepisów związanych z bezpieczeństwem ppoż. w obiektach. Za swoją działalność został odznaczony Krzyżem Zasługi.

Od kilku lat zarządzaniem firmą zajmuje się syn - Piotr Witkowski, który konsekwentnie prowadzi firmę w oparciu o ukształtowane podłoże przegród przeciwpożarowych. Jego zaangażowanie oraz etyka społeczna została doceniona poprzez odznaczenie Srebrnym Medalem za Zasługi dla Pożarnictwa. Nieustanne nastawienie na rozwój, wdrażanie innowacyjnych produktów sprawiły, iż obecnie nasza firma specjalizuje się w SZKLANYCH SYSTEMACH PPOŻ. z ukierunkowaniem na aranżacje wnętrz oraz specjalistyczne - techniczne przegrody szklane."

Name: Quality Drywall Midwest
Description:
Quality Drywall Midwest, Inc. is located in New Hope, MN and is proud to be a 4th generation, family- owned construction company. We have been a leader in providing quality commercial drywall services for well over 50 years. Our story has a deep history. Our family roots began with the first drywall contractor in Minnesota founded under the leadership of our grandfather, (the late) Boyer Palmer. Our father, Bruce Palmer, continued his passion in the industry with the establishment of his drywall business. He instilled in us valuable knowledge, work ethic and commitment. Experience, hard work and education prepared us to continue the leadership and growth of the company; navigating the business through cycles of change, challenges and growth in the industry.

The Quality Drywall family extends well beyond our name; it is our work culture. We pride ourselves on having a loyal, experienced field team. The longevity and success of our company is attributed to our highly-trained  workforce, experienced project management team, establishment of a safe and productive work environment and dedication to exceptional standards.
Quality construction means delivering an exceptional end product. Whether it’s an office building remodel, or ground-up construction; we engineer value and savings into every phase of the job.  We will provide quality workmanship and experienced project management throughout the completion of your project. We offer competitive estimates to meet your budget goals and dedicated staff to meet your schedule and timelines.
